title: Knysna seahorses on display at SANParks during Oyster Festival
description: KNYSNA NEWS AND VIDEO - One of the main...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"Video","html":"Video"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS AND VIDEO - One of the main attractions at SANParks’ headquarters on Thesen Island during this year’s Knysna Oyster Festival will be the breeding tank of the endangered Knysna seahorse.","html":"KNYSNA NEWS AND VIDEO - One of the main attractions at SANParks’ headquarters on Thesen Island during this year’s Knysna Oyster Festival will be the breeding tank of the endangered Knysna seahorse."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Field Ranger Chrystahl Mortlock, based at the Thesen Island centre, is responsible for the care of these delicate marine creatures.","html":"Field Ranger Chrystahl Mortlock, based at the Thesen Island centre, is responsible for the care of these delicate marine creatures."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Her daily tasks include feeding them a diet of brown shrimp to help ensure their survival."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Currently, the breeding tank houses 15 adult Knysna seahorses, while three juveniles are kept separately in the centre’s scientific storage facility for closer monitoring.","html":"Currently, the breeding tank houses 15 adult Knysna seahorses, while three juveniles are kept separately in the centre’s scientific storage facility for closer monitoring."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"WATCH VIDEO:","html":"WATCH VIDEO:"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Your browser does not support HTML5 video.","html":""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Knysna seahorses on display at SANParks during Oyster Festival
